g.text: Nominal I2C communication in dma mode
Step 2: receives a buffer, from the controller, in a non-blocking mode using DMA.
Step 3: waits for the I2C interrupt: read transfer completed.
Step 4: transmits the received buffer in a non-blocking mode using DMA.
Step 5: waits for the I2C interrupt: write transfer completed.
reports the success status by turning on the user led.
